posts.author: SewSuzette (Suzette Lempitsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I am attempting to add 2 conditions to my automation.

What are you trying to achieve

Basically, I want to ask it that when each of 2 check box columns are checked, then change my status to “Ready to start”. Once I add the 2nd condition, it won’t let me choose a 2nd check box column in the conditional command. Any suggestions?
